user.title: ESPHome MCP
user.description: Run an ESPHome-focused MCP server inside Home Assistant and expose it through a Home Assistant webhook. The webhook works through Nabu Casa Remote UI or any reverse proxy.

abort.already_configured: ESPHome MCP is already set up.

init.title: ESPHome MCP
init.description:
Configure all ESPHome MCP server and connection settings here.

{connect_url}

data_description.server_port: The port this server listens on. The default is 9590 so it can run alongside ha-mcp.
data_description.bind_host: Who can connect to the MCP server port directly. The Home Assistant webhook still works when loopback is selected.
data_description.webhook_auth: How MCP clients authenticate at the webhook URL. With the secret URL, the link itself is the credential. With Home Assistant administrator sign-in, clients authenticate through Home Assistant OAuth and must use an active administrator account.
data_description.enable_webhook: Turn off for local-only mode. The direct server port remains available.
data_description.external_url: Shown as the primary connect URL. Use this when Home Assistant sits behind your own domain or reverse proxy.
data_description.webhook_id_override: Replaces the random webhook secret in the connect URL (/api/webhook/...). Use a long, hard-to-guess value.
data_description.secret_path_override: Replaces the random path used for direct access on the server port.
data_description.regenerate_secrets: One-time action: mints a fresh random webhook secret and direct-access path.

server_start_failed.title: The ESPHome MCP server failed to start

server_package_import_failed.title: The ESPHome MCP server package could not be imported

server_restart_required.title: Restart Home Assistant to start ESPHome MCP

options.ha_auth: Sign in with Home Assistant administrator account (OAuth)
